# Entity Model

## Domain Entities

The following entities are the core data types grove operates on. They are all **in-memory, per-invocation** — grove is stateless and has no persistent entity store.

---

### Symbol

The primary domain entity. A definition or reference extracted from a source file by tree-sitter tag queries.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | String | Stable handle: `<lang>:<relpath>#<name>@<line>` (1-based line). Survives across turns. |
| name | String | The symbol's name (e.g. `parse`, `HashMap`, `main`) |
| kind | String | Tag-derived kind: `function`, `method`, `class`, `call`, etc. |
| is_definition | bool | `true` for definitions, `false` for references |
| file | String | Repository-relative path |
| line | usize | 1-based line number (editor convention) |
| col | usize | 1-based column number |
| start_byte | usize | Byte offset of the entire symbol (what `source` slices) |
| end_byte | usize | End byte offset |
| signature | String | Trimmed source line containing the name |
| parent | Option\<String\> | Owning container: impl type, class, trait, module |

**Source**: `src/engine.rs` — `Symbol` struct

---

### Defect

A syntactic error found by `check` — an ERROR or MISSING node in the parse tree.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| kind | &'static str | `"ERROR"` or `"MISSING"` |
| line | usize | 1-based line |
| col | usize | 1-based column |
| start_byte | usize | Byte offset start |
| end_byte | usize | Byte offset end |
| text | String | The error node's source text |

**Source**: `src/engine.rs` — `Defect` struct

---

### CallSite

A reference site found by `callers` — where a symbol name appears, with its enclosing function.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| file | String | File containing the reference |
| line | usize | 1-based line |
| col | usize | 1-based column |
| text | String | The reference text |
| in_function | Option\<String\> | Enclosing function/method name |
| source | String | Provenance: `"structural"` (tree-sitter) or `"textual"` (grep) |

**Source**: `src/ops.rs` — `CallSite` struct

---

### MapEntry

A definition within a file-map, listing which other symbols it references.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| (inherits Symbol fields) | | Kind, name, parent, row, signature |
| references | Vec\<String\> | Names of symbols this definition uses |

**Source**: `src/ops.rs` — `MapEntry` struct

---

### FileMap

A file's structural map — its definitions and their outgoing references.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| file | String | File path |
| entries | Vec\<MapEntry\> | Definitions in this file with their references |

**Source**: `src/ops.rs` — `FileMap` struct

---

### Grammar

A resolved grammar artifact — enough to load and extract. Cheaply cloned (WASM bytes and query text are `Arc`-shared).

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| name | String | Language name (e.g. `javascript`) |
| version | String | Grammar version (e.g. `0.23.1`) |
| wasm | Arc\<Vec\<u8\>\> | Compiled tree-sitter WASM module |
| tags_query | Arc\<String\> | Compiled `tags.scm` content |
| locals_query | Option\<Arc\<String\>\> | Compiled `locals.scm` (scope-aware go-to-def) |
| imports_query | Option\<Arc\<String\>\> | Compiled `imports.scm` (cross-file import resolution) |
| profile | Arc\<Profile\> | Language-specific behavioral configuration |

**Source**: `src/registry.rs` — `Grammar` struct

---

### Profile

Language-specific node-kind configuration that drives structural niceties (parent grouping, enclosing-function for callers, go-to-def). Data, not code — new languages are supported by dropping a manifest, no recompile.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| function_kinds | Vec\<String\> | Node kinds that are function/method definitions |
| containers | Vec\<(String, String)\> | Container node kind + name field (e.g. `("impl_item", "type")`) |
| identifier_kinds | Vec\<String\> | Node kinds whose text is a usable identifier |
| call_kinds | Vec\<String\> | `@reference.*` capture suffixes for call sites (default: `["call"]`) |
| import_resolution | Option\<String\> | Strategy: `"dotted_package"` (Python) or `"relative_path"` (JS) |

**Source**: `src/registry.rs` — `Profile` struct

---

### ImportBinding

An import-edge binding discovered during scope-aware go-to-def (ADR 0001). Not a top-level struct — used internally during resolution.

---

### Manifest

Per-language metadata stored in `registry/<lang>/manifest.json`.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| name | String | Language name |
| version | String | Grammar version |
| extensions | Vec\<String\> | File extensions (e.g. `["js", "mjs", "cjs"]`) |
| source | Option\<Source\> | Provenance: `{repo, rev}` |
| profile | Profile | Language-specific behavioral configuration |

**Source**: `src/registry.rs` — `Manifest` struct

---

### Source

The result of `ops::source` — a symbol's full source text with disambiguation metadata.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | String | The matched symbol id |
| source | String | Full source text of the symbol |
| other_candidates | Vec\<String\> | Ids of other definitions with the same name |

---

## Entity Relationships

```
Manifest ──contains──▶ Profile
Manifest ──resolved───▶ Grammar (wasm + queries + profile)
Grammar ──parses────▶ Source files
Source files ──extract──▶ Symbol[]
Source files ──extract──▶ Defect[]
Symbol ──grouped────▶ MapEntry ──collected──▶ FileMap
Symbol ──referenced──▶ CallSite
```
